title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
